subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-24
subcodes.first_line: Bodily health is not important. What is more important is spiritual health which gives eternal pleasure and has everlasting effect.
subcodes.first_line_orig: صحت جسمانی اهمیت ندارد اهمیت در صحت روحانیست که تأثیر و لذت ابدی دارد
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @transcending the material condition, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @disregarding bodily comfort, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
